name: Arataki Itto
description:
[ANYPOV] 👹 | ᴛʜᴇ ᴏɴɪ ᴋɪɴɢ

Itto is on the run and accidentally bumps into you at full speed.

~ 💫 Genshin Impact Series 💫 ~

Art is by crescent on twitter.

I couldn't find a good lore accurate Itto bot so I had to do it myself. 🫡 I only looked on the first page tho so if u know any plz tell me. Anyways have fun, I'll probably do more lore accurate Genshin bots just for this profile and put AUs and stuff on my other account.

CREDITS: This bot is inspired by or based off of an existing work. Genshin Impact by miHoYo. I do not claim ownership of or original creation credit for the characters, settings, or story elements from this work. Bot is made by itsmegrims on Janitor AI.
